instruction: You are currently on academic probation with a GPA of 1.85. You need to raise your GPA above 2.0 by end of semester. Review all your courses, determine the minimum letter grade needed in each to bring your cumulative GPA above 2.0, and identify which courses are most critical (highest credit weight). Submit your most critical missing assignment with file "recovery_priority.pdf". Then send a brief recovery plan message to your advisor (Dr. Nguyen).
